title: Local OR coefficient recurrences
summary: Proves the two adjacent-index recurrence identities for the regular Pochhammer factor by moving one unit of Laplacian degree from the output exponent to either input exponent.

mathematicalContent.heading: Adjacent moves
mathematicalContent.body: For I=(a,b,c) with a>0, the two relevant neighbors are I_b=(a−1,b+1,c) and I_c=(a−1,b,c+1).

mathematicalContent.heading: First-slot identity
mathematicalContent.body: The Pochhammer factor at I_b is related to that at I through the first input factor and the common multiplier.

mathematicalContent.heading: Second-slot identity
mathematicalContent.body: The analogous formula holds after increasing c.

mathematicalContent.heading: Verified scope
mathematicalContent.body: Lean proves both identities for the Gamma-ratio/Pochhammer part A_I for every rational parameter choice. This is local coefficient algebra, not yet the global obstruction-sum cancellation.

correspondence.leanType: def ORFirstSlotMultiplier {N : ℕ} (n w₁ w₂ : ℚ) (I : ORIndex N) : ℚ
correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Defines the common multiplier on the right side of the first-slot recurrence.

correspondence.leanType: def ORSecondSlotMultiplier {N : ℕ} (n w₁ w₂ : ℚ) (I : ORIndex N) : ℚ
correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Defines the same common multiplier for the second-slot recurrence.

correspondence.leanType: def ORFirstSlotLeftFactor {N : ℕ} (n w₁ : ℚ) (I : ORIndex N) : ℚ
correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Defines the coefficient multiplying the neighbor in the first-slot recurrence.

correspondence.leanType: def ORSecondSlotLeftFactor {N : ℕ} (n w₂ : ℚ) (I : ORIndex N) : ℚ
correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Defines the coefficient multiplying the neighbor in the second-slot recurrence.

correspondence.leanType: theorem ORRegularA_move_a_to_b_expanded {N : ℕ} (n w₁ w₂ : ℚ) (I : ORIndex N) (ha : 0 < I.a) : ORRegularA n w₁ w₂ (I.move_a_to_b ha) = pochhammerQ (ORAlpha N n w₁ w₂) ((I.b + 1) + I.c) * pochhammerQ (ORBeta N n w₁) (N - (I.b + 1)) * pochhammerQ (ORGamma N n w₂) (N - I.c)
correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Expands the Pochhammer factor after moving one unit from a to b.

correspondence.leanType: theorem ORRegularA_move_a_to_c_expanded {N : ℕ} (n w₁ w₂ : ℚ) (I : ORIndex N) (ha : 0 < I.a) : ORRegularA n w₁ w₂ (I.move_a_to_c ha) = pochhammerQ (ORAlpha N n w₁ w₂) (I.b + (I.c + 1)) * pochhammerQ (ORBeta N n w₁) (N - I.b) * pochhammerQ (ORGamma N n w₂) (N - (I.c + 1))
correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Expands the Pochhammer factor after moving one unit from a to c.

correspondence.leanType: def ORRegularAFirstRecurrence {N : ℕ} (n w₁ w₂ : ℚ) (I : ORIndex N) : Prop
correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: States the first adjacent-index recurrence for every move with a>0.

correspondence.leanType: def ORRegularASecondRecurrence {N : ℕ} (n w₁ w₂ : ℚ) (I : ORIndex N) : Prop
correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: States the second adjacent-index recurrence for every move with a>0.

correspondence.leanType: theorem ORFirstSlotLeftFactor_eq_two_beta_last {N : ℕ} (n w₁ : ℚ) (I : ORIndex N) (ha : 0 < I.a) : ORFirstSlotLeftFactor n w₁ I = 2 * (ORBeta N n w₁ + ((N - (I.b + 1) : ℕ) : ℚ))
correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Rewrites the first left factor as twice the last β-Pochhammer factor in the neighboring coefficient.

correspondence.leanType: theorem ORSecondSlotLeftFactor_eq_two_gamma_last {N : ℕ} (n w₂ : ℚ) (I : ORIndex N) (ha : 0 < I.a) : ORSecondSlotLeftFactor n w₂ I = 2 * (ORGamma N n w₂ + ((N - (I.c + 1) : ℕ) : ℚ))
correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Rewrites the second left factor as twice the last γ-Pochhammer factor in the neighboring coefficient.

correspondence.leanType: theorem neg_ORSlotMultiplier_eq_two_alpha_last {N : ℕ} (n w₁ w₂ : ℚ) (I : ORIndex N) : -ORFirstSlotMultiplier n w₁ w₂ I = 2 * (ORAlpha N n w₁ w₂ + ((I.b + I.c : ℕ) : ℚ))
correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Rewrites the negative common multiplier as twice the next α-Pochhammer factor.

correspondence.leanType: theorem neg_ORSecondSlotMultiplier_eq_two_alpha_last {N : ℕ} (n w₁ w₂ : ℚ) (I : ORIndex N) : -ORSecondSlotMultiplier n w₁ w₂ I = 2 * (ORAlpha N n w₁ w₂ + ((I.b + I.c : ℕ) : ℚ))
correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Proves the identical α rewrite for the second-slot multiplier.

correspondence.leanType: theorem ORRegularA_firstRecurrence {N : ℕ} (n w₁ w₂ : ℚ) (I : ORIndex N) : ORRegularAFirstRecurrence n w₁ w₂ I
correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Proves the first adjacent-index recurrence for the regular Pochhammer factor.

correspondence.leanType: theorem ORRegularA_secondRecurrence {N : ℕ} (n w₁ w₂ : ℚ) (I : ORIndex N) : ORRegularASecondRecurrence n w₁ w₂ I
correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Proves the second adjacent-index recurrence for the regular Pochhammer factor.

correspondence.leanType: theorem ORRegularA_satisfiesLemma31Recurrences {N : ℕ} (n w₁ w₂ : ℚ) : (∀ I : ORIndex N, ORRegularAFirstRecurrence n w₁ w₂ I) ∧ (∀ I : ORIndex N, ORRegularASecondRecurrence n w₁ w₂ I)
correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Combines the two verified local recurrence families into one theorem.

references.locator: Classification of invariant bilinear differential operators
references.note: Flat-model origin of the coefficient family.
Primary curved ambient source for the encoded OR recurrence.

limitations: The theorems concern ORRegularA, the Pochhammer/Gamma-ratio factor, not the full trinomial-weighted coefficient sum against a concrete geometric defect basis. They do not by themselves prove SatisfiesDefectCancellationQ or operator tangentiality.
